narrative.narrative: Fear has tightened its grip as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, mirroring the extreme anxiety that marked the August 2024 bottom. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a pattern that preceded the sharp recovery from that very same capitulation event. The market is pricing in despair while smart money appears to be reloading.
narrative.headline: Extreme Fear Meets Quiet Accumulation

consensus.key_reasoning: The live score of 25 anchors the phase to Panic (24-31), where extreme Fear & Greed readings and quiet stablecoin expansion mirror the August 2024 accumulation bottom. While the pattern match and smart-money reloading suggest an approaching bottom, the current position on the ladder still requires CAUTION as the market has not yet confirmed a trend reversal.
disagreements_noted: Analyst labels the phase as Anxiety (39-46) despite a score of 25, which legally falls into the Panic band (24-31).
Analyst emphasizes diverging risk-off factors (ETF flows, VIX, momentum) while the Narrative Writer focuses on the high-confidence bottoming pattern and smart-money accumulation.
